SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.persist

Class HostSnapshot

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.persist.HostSnapshot
public class HostSnapshot extends Object
Per-host data snapshot for scan persistence. Contains all materialized scan data for a single target host.
Author:
Milton Smith
